title: 22mm x 15mm Brass Compression Reducing Coupling - Bag of 2
features: This listing is for a Pack of 2
description: Brass Compression Reducing Coupling Fitting - 22mm x 15mmA 22mm compression fitting enables connection to a 15mm pipe.Highly durable compression plumbing fittings manufactured in brass for resilience and to be long lasting.Use on all direct and indirect hot and cold domestic water services, for commercial and industrial applications.These compression plumbing fittings have excellent conductivity and are suited for hot water distribution within buildings.High resistance to corrosion and rust and good for water with corrosive properties.Suitable for Water, Oil, and Gas Systems in Hard and Soft Water Environments.Available In Different Sizes!Technical Specifications: Compression Reducing Coupling Finish - Brass Reducing Coupling End Feed Hot and Cold Water Systems Hardwearing WRAS Approved Highly Durable Anti-Corrosion Size - 22mm x 15mmPlease Note: These couplings are picked loose from our stock and bagged in non-retail packaging.
